title: IsItWaxed
description: IsItWaxed is a mod that adds a simple HUD element to indicate whether a block is waxed or not. It supports all waxable blocks in the game.
body:
![IsItWaxed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b75aee943c71a73d401c7f6d925dee96c4e7485.png) # 🪓 IsItWaxed

> IsItWaxed is a mod that adds a simple HUD element to indicate whether a block is waxed or not. It supports all waxable blocks in the game. ![Waxed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b2eace4e568456d6ca3884dbfa045cf0b4a20e4_0.webp) ![Not waxed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/183c220f67a2e169125f9399987bdd0f2433d092_0.webp) *This mod is inspired by [Waxed Not Waxed](https://modrinth.com/mod/waxednotwaxed)*. ## 🔧 Highly customizable! ### 🛠️ Required tool > By default, looking at an oxidizable block with anything in hand show the waxed/not waxed icon. With the config menu, you can choose to *only show them* with an **axe or honeycomb** in main hand. ### 📍 Position > By default, the icon is displayed in the middle of the HUD. With the config menu, you can change it to: - Middle - Middle left - Middle right - Top middle - Top left - Top right - Bottom left - Bottom right ### 💬 Displayed text **🟠 Colors** The waxed and not waxed text's color can be modified with the config menu. **☁️ Shadow** You don't like the text shadow? You can disable it with the config menu.
